# awscc_certificatemanager_acme_domain_validation (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::CertificateManager::AcmeDomainValidation



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `acme_endpoint_arn` (String) The ARN of the ACME endpoint this domain validation is associated with.
- `arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the domain validation.
- `domain_name` (String) The domain name to validate.
- `prevalidation_options` (Attributes) Prevalidation method configuration. Currently only DNS-based prevalidation is supported. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--prevalidation_options))
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags associated with the domain validation. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

<a id="nestedatt--prevalidation_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `prevalidation_options`

Read-Only:

- `dns_prevalidation` (Attributes) DNS-based prevalidation options for the domain validation. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--prevalidation_options--dns_prevalidation))

<a id="nestedatt--prevalidation_options--dns_prevalidation"></a>
### Nested Schema for `prevalidation_options.dns_prevalidation`

Read-Only:

- `domain_scope` (Attributes) Controls which certificate types are authorized to be issued for the domain via the ACME endpoint. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--prevalidation_options--dns_prevalidation--domain_scope))
- `hosted_zone_id` (String) The Route 53 hosted zone ID for automatic DNS record management. When provided, the service creates the validation DNS record on the customer's behalf.

<a id="nestedatt--prevalidation_options--dns_prevalidation--domain_scope"></a>
### Nested Schema for `prevalidation_options.dns_prevalidation.domain_scope`

Read-Only:

- `exact_domain` (String) Whether certificates may be issued for the exact domain.
- `subdomains` (String) Whether certificates may be issued for subdomains of the domain.
- `wildcards` (String) Whether wildcard certificates may be issued for the domain.




<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) The key name of the tag.
- `value` (String) The value for the tag.
